title: LACTATION AND FEEDING SUPPORT - 211info
text: DAISY CHAIN LACTATION AND FEEDING SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers home visits conducted by an International Board Certified Lactation Consultant (IBCLC) in the first 2 weeks after baby is born or adopted. IBCLCs create an individualized care plan to screen for and address barriers to successful chest/breastfeeding. 1270 Charnelton Street Daisy's Place 2nd Floor Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Expectant families, through birth or adoption Hours: By appointment Email (541) 505-1139 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 505-1139 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information. New applicants will be put on a waitlist; waitlist information available on website. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Doula Services Postpartum Care Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - FULL SPECTRUM DOULA SUPPORT HUMAN REPRODUCTION - NURSING NOOK MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - DANDELION STREET TEAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - MUSIC CLASSES/BABY POP MUSIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DAISY CHAIN
